直到手机自动下载了一款【阴阳外卖】APP。
【叮！新订单：送一份麻辣烫到乱葬岗，备注：多加血（鸭血）！】
苏铭硬着头皮送去，没想到恐怖的女鬼吃完不仅给了五星好评，还打赏了【鬼遮眼】技能书！
从此，苏铭打开了新世界的大门：
给饿死鬼送自助餐，获得【暴食体质】，怎么吃都不胖还能变强；
给孟婆送加冰可乐，获得【孟婆汤兑换券】，让人瞬间失忆；
给阎王送全家桶，直接被封为【地府编外巡查使】！
当诡异复苏，众人惊恐逃窜时，苏铭淡定地骑着小电驴穿过鬼潮：“让一让，前面那个鬼王，你的螺蛳粉到了，超时要扣钱的！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/32bcd6a6ccd5931c02e7444fe7b82de3","author":"大鬼乖","author_id":"","book_id":"7582054230496660542","book_name":"地府唯一外卖员：阎王求我别断货","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6152人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":75,"name":"外卖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=75&name=外卖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7582054236788113982","read_count":"6152","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"374711"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.3","serial_count":"111","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,外卖","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2odcabd373b0ff68016636830c6dbb5510~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779387506&x-signature=NV321%2BegmGVc7syIUsiRhuF7K0g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1180228473601128","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"18"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323021826EEB36E7B6CCAEF488876"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3833,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":991},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":
